---
applyTo: "packages/api/public/**/*,packages/api/src/**/*.ts"
---

UI/admin changes should make pipeline stages understandable to a human editor. Prefer clear labels such as Source Candidate, Research Packet, Script Revision, Production Asset, Approval Gate, Publish Event, and Job Log.

Do not hide warnings. Surface source/research/script/production warnings near the action that depends on them.
